TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Isaetipan_pahikukian, title = Isaetipan_pahikukian, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaetipan_pahikukian} }

S.FORM: alang Isaetipan pahikukian ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,927 buwan, 5,066 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 25% kyan ku 1,247 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 75% kyan ku 3,819 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Pukpuk. tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga kiyumi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Isaetipan pahikukian ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,927 buwan, 5,066 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 25% kyan ku 1,247 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 75% kyan ku 3,819 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Truku 2%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Pukpuk. tay 'llaw na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Isaetipan pahikukian hya' ga kiyumi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
